name: Virgin Australia Holdings Limited.
analysis: VGN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7700. Trade idea: entry A$2.8400, stop A$2.4750, target A$3.3500 (1.40:1) — then trail it.
